entry.title: Re: Characters that have hexadecimal display between HEX0...

Hi Roland,

It is a Virtual Cube, pointed directly at the HANA CV.

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: How will the MCQ test on 11th be conducted ? Will it be separate for each team member with respective ids or using one id and sitting together as a team to solve the question ?

entry.title: Re: IS SAP GUI a relational database?
entry.content:
SAP R/3 or S/4HANA architecture is called a 3-Tier: Database + Application Server + Presentation Layer (click to maximize):

The SAP GUI sits on the presentation layer. There other clients, like the WEB GUI, the Business Client, ...

More info here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/sap-architecture/td-p/12562428

entry.title: Re: SAP BeLux: stretch the limits of Dox premium invoices
entry.content:
Hi Axel,

I would like to suggest that you mention the correct SAP Product name and also link to the SAP Discovery Center page where interested readers can find more information.

Best regards 

Gregor

entry.title: Re: ILX Learning Admin Proxy as same view as learner?
entry.content: Hi there, the admin viewing the user's ILX via proxy will be supported in future releases. Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Automatic trigger subscription in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,
It was due to the JWT token. Once the new JWT token in BTP was created the error was solved and the connection was established properly. 
Key rotation in BTP was the solution for this error. 

KR,
Sayuj.

entry.title: Export long table storie in SAC to PDF
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I need your help. Currently, I am programming a button to export a story to PDF in SAC. The script for the button is as follows:

ExportToPDF1.setFileName('LibroMayor');
ExportToPDF1.setPageRange([1]);
ExportToPDF1.setPageOrientation(PageOrientation.Portrait);
ExportToPDF1.setPageSize(PageSize.Auto);
ExportToPDF1.exportView();
Contador1 = Contador1 + 1;
Bookmarks.saveBookmark({name: 'LIBROS', isGlobal: true, isDefault: true}, true);

The story includes a long table, and the exported table is missing rows, even when the 'Auto-size' and 'page table vertically' options are enabled.However, when I export the story through the 'File > Export' route, the export works correctly, and the table is exported with all its rows.

 

 

Could you please advise me on what I need to include in the button script to export the complete table? Thank you #SAC

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI

entry.title: Cannot recreate SAP build app
entry.content:
Hi Guys 

I was a souscription on SAP build app and was an  access issue to modifies something , for that a deleted souscription .

I try to recreate a souscription but not possible , i get this error

 

To subscribe this application link an Identity Authentication tenant to the subaccount with the "Establish Trust" option. For more information: 

Error Code: 422

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content:
Hello,

I have been constantly having issues with SAP Build Apps deployed apps. Just a few weeks ago, my deployed apps were not working, I was getting the error "Internal Server Error - 500", saying that the GET request to the app destination had missing zone information.

Then, suddenly the apps started working, and were working properly for a couple of weeks. Now, I am getting again the "Internal Server Error", but with the following details:

Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token undefined

Does anyone know if there is an issue with the service?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Next Philly Cheesesteak, er, Stammtisch?
entry.content:
Hi, @JimSpath:

We're past due for another Stammtisch. April isn't going to be a good month for that, but maybe within the next month or two. 

When were you thinking of coming to town?

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Customers and Partners are using SAP BTP to Innovate and Extend their SAP Applications
entry.content:
At SAPinsider EMEA 2023 Conference in Copenhagen, we met up with SAP BTP customers and partners to capture their inspiring stories.

SAP BTP Customers

  • Nordzucker, one the world's leading sugar manufacturers and produces animal feed, molasses, fertilizers, and biofuels.  Improved and simplified their maintenance processes with 2BM Mobile Work Order built with SAP BTP. 

  • delaware, a global IT solutions and services provider, uses SAP BTP internally to create a real-time integration framework that delivered higher customer satisfaction and reduced costs.  

  • Maxion Wheels, the world's #1 wheel producer, leverages SAP BTP with SAP Datasphere to provide a single business data fabric for their sales, finance, inventory, and logistics departments.

  • Satair, spare parts division of Airbus, has 4 hours to get a spare part to a plane to get it flying again, it uses SAP BTP as its Swiss army knife.


SAP BTP Partners

  • 2BM Software, develops and sells maintenance, service and warehouse applications exclusively for SAP built with SAP BTP.

  • delaware, a global IT solutions and services provider, helps customers solve their business needs of today and tomorrow using SAP BTP for integration, application development and automation, AI, and data and analytics.

  • Precog, helps customers get their SAP and Non-SAP application data out easily and into SAP BTP with SAP Datasphere to harmonize their data.

  • NTT Data, delivers end to end processes, innovates new business models, and builds solutions for their customers with SAP BTP.  NTT Data is the partner supporting Satair’s successful SAP BTP projects.


Learn more about SAP BTP. Explore more SAP BTP partner stories.

If you are a partner, get more SAP BTP resources on SAP PartnerEdge.

Estimados buenas tardes,

NEcesito por favor su ayuda, tengo varios almacenes definidos en el sistem y necesito que un usuario pueda agregar precios solo a artiiculos de un especifico almacen, ¡como realizo esto en SAP Busines One?

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Brazil: Atualizações no CT-e MDF-e
entry.content:
(English version here)

Olá pessoal,

O time de SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de fatura de entrada e de faturamento de saída para o Brasil entregou semanas atrás as atualizações nas soluções de Conhecimento de Transporte Eletrônico (CT-e) e Manifesto Eletrônico de Documentos Fiscais (MDF-e). As mudanças atendem à Nota Técnica 2024.001 versão 1.01 (Inclusão do Benefício Fiscal) de CT-e e à Nota Técnica 2024.001 versão 1.01 (Evento de Encerramento) de MDF-e da SEFAZ.

Nota Técnica 2024.001 versão 1.01 para CT-e e MDF-e

Conhecimento de Transporte Eletrônico (CT-e):

A nova atualização do CT-e (modelo 57) e CT-e OS (modelo 67) permite incluir os novos campos vICMSDeson (valor do ICMS desonerado) e cBenef (Código do Benefício Fiscal) nos arquivos XML. Esses campos serão incluídos nos seguintes grupos de ICMS: ICMS20, ICMS45, ICMS60, ICMS90 e ICMSOutraUF.

Você pode implementar as mudanças seguindo as instruções nas seguintes SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3444678
  • SAP Note 3444679
  • SAP Note 3444823
  • SAP Note 3444824
  • SAP Note 3441171
  • SAP Note 3445374

Você pode implementar as mudanças na solução SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP NFE) seguindo as instruções nas SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3426934
  • SAP Note 3444678
  • SAP Note 3444679
  • SAP Note 3444823
  • SAP Note 3444824

A Nota Técnica 2024.001 Versão 1.02 de CT-e foi revisada e não haverá impacto na solução de Conhecimento de Transporte Eletrônico (CT-e).

Consulte o SAP Knowledge Base Article 2807654 para obter informações sobre resolução de problemas.

Manifesto Eletrônico de Documentos Fiscais (MDF-e):

A atualização no MDF-e (modelo 58) permite incluir nos arquivos XML o campo indEncPorTerceiro, que foi introduzido no evento de encerramento (tipo 110112). Para implementar esta atualização, siga as instruções na SAP Note 3437854.

A Nota Técnica 2024.001 Versão 1.02 de MDF-e foi revisada. O schema XML foi atualizado em nosso serviço, não sendo necessária a implementação de outras SAP Notes para esta alteração.

Você pode implementar as mudanças na solução SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP NFE) seguindo as instruções na SAP Note 3431096.

Blog posts relacionados:

  • NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 versão 1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
  • NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 versão 1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal

Para obter um passo a passo sobre como usar o SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de fatura de entrada e de faturamento de saída para o Brasil, consulte as seguintes páginas do portal SAP Help:

  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de emissão de fatura de entrada para o Brasil
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, opção de faturamento de saída para o Brasil

Você pode receber alerta por email quando novas SAP Notes forem lançadas ou atualizadas nos componentes listados abaixo; basta seguir as instruções do SAP Knowledge Base Article 2171560.

  • CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-BR
  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-IN
  • FI-LOC-NFE-BR-OUT
  • LOD-LH-NFE
  • SLL-NFE

Acesse o gerenciador de modificações legais para ter uma noção do que está planejado para ser suportado. Consulte o SAP Knowledge Base Article 3421995 e a página “regulatory change manager” para entender como usar esta ferramenta.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like (Kudos) e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. Sinta-se à vontade para deixar suas perguntas ou ler posts semelhantes no SAP Community do SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Para acompanhar as últimas notícias da NF-e, siga a tag SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) e a comunidade SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Obrigado e até a próxima,
Thiago

Tags: electronic transportation document, nota técnica, v1.01, 2024/001, inclusão do benefício fiscal, tax benefit inclusion, tax benefit code, código de benefício fiscal, documento fiscal eletrônico, electronic fiscal document, electronic manifest of tax documents, brasil, einvoice, einvoicing, e-invoicing, electronic invoice, electronic invoicing, edocument, edoc, e-document, e-docs, e-doc, e-docs, drc, document compliance, nota fiscal eletrônica, electronic nota fiscal, ct-e outros serviços, ct-e other services

entry.title: Manage Equipment connectivity
entry.content:
Hello All,
This is an issue related to manage equipment connectivity app. 

Fig1. 

 

I could connect the tags in asset connectivity app. But I was trying to setup a new equipment which is different than the asset, I cannot find the option for adding service provider and also assign plant option is disabled. 

Fig2.

 

 

Fig3. 

I followed the prerequisites as mention-
1. Equipment template
2. Indicator group
3. Service provider
4. Equipment
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/production-connectivity-model/manage-equipment-connectivity 

Could anyone please let me know what is the issue or am I missing some steps. 

Also, one more question related to Equipment and Asset. What are the main difference between 2 things. Whenever we connect to Tags, it always represents the Assets connected in Design production process and also in automatic triggers. 
Where do we exactly use the equipment and its connectivity. 

Thanks and regards,
Sayuj.

thank you very much

entry.title: Enter the era of spatial computing for enterprise with SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Introduction

Since the advent of computers, engineers have continually sought to enhance human-computer interaction. We progressed from clicking buttons on a keyboard to the point-and-click method with a mouse, to utilizing our sense of touch. Throughout this evolution, we've unlocked more natural forms of interaction.

Apple recently introduced Apple Vision Pro, offering new and immersive ways to interact with digital elements in three dimensions with a user’s eyes, hands, and voice.

Enterprises worldwide are exploring the potential for building new experiences for their employees. Picture yourself taking a deep dive into your data, with charts covering your entire living room to infer insights or envision designing hardware components from multiple angles with agility to achieve unmatched precision.

The SAP BTP SDK for iOS, a part of the SAP Build Code, already accelerates app development for enterprise developers building for iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch. With the 24.4 release, developers have the same seamless capability while building for Apple Vision Pro. Developers can now build native experiences for their business processes on visionOS by securely interacting with their enterprise data through SAP Mobile Services on SAP BTP, making their essential SAP systems ready for the future.

 

SAP BTP SDK for iOS Capability Overview

Developers who have previously used SAP BTP SDK for iOS are familiar with its frameworks. Some of these frameworks have now been enhanced to provide fundamental support to developers for building native apps for Apple Vision Pro.

SAPFoundation: Configure the authentication mechanism of the app, securely communicate with SAP and 3rd Party systems over the network, and cache necessary information on the device.

SAPFioriFlows:  Customize the end-user onboarding experience common to most enterprise apps by leveraging the SAP Fiori for iOS design guidelines. For in-app screens, be sure to check out the “Designing for visionOS” guide published by Apple.

SAPOData: Create apps on Apple Vision Pro that interact with enterprise OData APIs for apps running in online mode. You can rest assured about your enterprise data being safe as all the on-device data is persisted in a Secure Store.

SAPCommon: Leverage fundamental capabilities used by developers and other frameworks, like logging and error handling.

You can see all of these frameworks at play by using the SAP BTP SDK Assistant for iOS shipped with the 24.4 release to create a starting application with the code for user-onboarding already in place. For example, you can configure Optic ID for the app passcode right out of the box.

 

Spatial Apps by SAP

SAP Mobile Start has been available in the App Store for Apple Vision Pro since its launch in February, bringing an enterprise user’s content, tasks and apps to the infinite canvas of Apple Vision Pro. Under the hood, SAP Mobile Start is built using the SAP BTP SDK for iOS, serving as a testament to the kind of experiences developers can now build themselves, too!

SAP Analytics Cloud is also available, allowing SAP Analytics Cloud users to experience their mobile-ready stories on Apple Vision Pro.

 

Next Steps

Get ready to explore the possibilities of building spatial enterprise applications for Apple Vision Pro with the latest SAP BTP SDK for iOS 24.4 release. Download Xcode 15.2 or later to run the apps built with the SDK on an Apple Vision Pro simulator now!

Stay tuned for more blog posts and tutorials in the SAP Community.

 

Important Links

  • What is SAP Build Code?
  • What is SAP Mobile Services?
  • What is SAP BTP SDK for iOS?
  • SAP and Apple Partnership

entry.title: Re: Disable "Auto Enter" feature on RF device by delivering customized message
entry.content: Excellent blog Madhu! This detailed blog shows the appropriate knowledge about the subject and resolution to the issue that may occur or might have occurred to Users across industries. Keep it up!

entry.title: Re: In Edit Functional Location page, Apply button is ren...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can modify the FunctionalLocationCreateUpdate.page metadata to adjust the text:

 
{
"Position": "right",
"SystemItem": "$(PLT,'Done','')",
"Text": "/SAPAssetManager/Rules/Common/Platform/DoneText.js",
"OnPress": "/SAPAssetManager/Actions/FunctionalLocation/CreateUpdate/FunctionalLocationCreateUpdateRequired.action"
}
 
The text for that button is returned in the DoneText.js rule.  Either modify that rule, or create a new rule and change the target of the "Text" property above to point to the new rule.  The translatable strings are found in the i18n.properties files.
 
The existing code for DoneText.js looks like this:
 
export default function DoneText(context) {
if (isAndroid(context)) {
return context.localizeText('save');
} else {
return context.localizeText('done');
}
}
 
Replace the string name from i18n.properties that you want to use.  If you don't want different strings for iOS vs. Android, you can simply: return context.localizeText('MyNewString');
 
MyNewString above should be a valid string name from the i18n.properties file.

entry.title: Re: What is the complete list of function restrictions du...
entry.content:
Hi Fancy,

There is no one SAP Note covering all. Here are a few notes for 2402:

  • 3389719 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402: Release Restriction Note
  • 3399774 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 in a 3-system landscape: Release Restriction Note
  • 3404992 - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance S/4HANA Cloud 2402, Local Versions: Release Restriction Note
  • 3404981 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, Local Versions: Release Restriction Note

I am writing a blog to cover all of points around major upgrade like this, and restrictions are one of them.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Instance Refresh Pending transport
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to schedule instans refresh from PJ9 (Productive) to PJ8 (QA) with SAP_ALL profile but we want to know what happens with the pending transports and objects that stays in QA and aren´t in Productive yet.

On October 2023 we request the same instance refresh and apparently the objects that were in pending transports were executed again automatically and the version of those objects was not the same as in the productive environment.

We hope we have been clear with the doubt, if not please let me know to be more specific.

Best regards.

entry.title: MX EINVOICING - “RegimenFiscalReceptor” field
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

How should the info related to “RegimenFiscalReceptor” be maintained in the S4HANA Public Cloud?

Thanks a lot


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MX EINVOICING - “RegimenFiscalReceptor” field
entry.content:
Hello,

The field 'RegimenFiscalReceptor' in México eDocument XML is managed within the Value Mapping 'RECEIVER_TAX_REGIME'.

Kindly refer to this Value Mapping under Configure Value Mapping app for further configuration.

Hope it assists you.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content:
Unsure why do you want to create a separate connection between SAC and data sphere when the Guided Experience trial account has it already enabled.

There is a product switch that you could use to jump to data sphere, just in case the product switch is not enabled you can enter the URL for SAC that came in along with your SAP data Sphere 

In the datasphere tenant go to System -> Configuration --> Tenant Link, add the tenant link of SAC to jump to SAC from Data Sphere and if this is trial account, there must be a default SAC link by SAP given as part of your trial account for Data sphere


hope this helps, incase i have mis understood your query please provide some more details for better understanding.

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between REISCDCF & REISCNOA T codes?
entry.content: The question could also be. "We use cars and eat bread. What is the difference?"

entry.title: Re: Sales Rebates Pricing SD
entry.content: Is anybody aware if Rebates CCM has Brazil localization?

entry.title: Re: Are WID Files Encrypted?
entry.content: add .zip after a wid file, open it and have fun 🙂

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 Reporting deprecation of BIRT & multi domain...
entry.content:
Hello,

 Any reports using BIRT will no longer be able to use BIRT when they are retired.  Example:

If a Custom Spreadsheet (RDF) report is using BIRT on top of the data source, it will not be able to do so after 2H 2024 when that report type is retired.

If a Table report is using BIRT on top of the report as a data source, this can continue to operate currently as there is no retirement date for Table reports currently.

 

Also, this has no bearing on Custom LMS reports in PRD.  PRD is not a part of these announcements.

Thanks,
Ben

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData

entry.title: Re: 10+ ways to reshape your SAP landscape with SAP BTP - Blog 3 Interview
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this, very helpful.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello! I have used a learning portal available to veterans for another software company, so I was thrilled to see SAP has a similar (although more broad) opportunity. 

I am a female veteran working in consulting. My role is a management consultant role, but I work with technology delivery teams closely. 
With the recent change to ECC support, I’ve seen many SAP opportunities. 
I’d love to learn more about the product to be a better partner to both the business and delivery teams on my digital transformation projects. 

I live in a rural area where a military base and hospital provide most employment. This type of opportunity would help me build the skills to stay relevant and support SAP implementation/migration projects.

I appreciate the consideration, and, again, am so glad SAP has a program like this!

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @Arun2024:

I don't think you're asking about SAP Community or about the topic of my post.

Since you're new to SAP and want to learn more, you may want to seek assistance in the Beginner Corner: https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner/gh-p/students-corner.

I hope that helps!

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: Ex-Post forecast or Test Phase? How to determine the best forecasting algorithm
entry.content: Hi Laura, thank you for the insightful article. If I have total 3 years of historical data and I set the test phase to be last 6 months, do we have the capability to see the forecast results within the test phase of 6 months? In SAP IBP, I currently do not see the option to choose the key figure to store results of the test phase forecast.

entry.title: Re: Split Outbound Delivery Order in SAP S/4HANA Extended Warehouse Management
entry.content:
Hi @gopi4412, 
if the delivery split was executed successfully in EWM then there should be new outbound delivery created in ERP with the split quantity, if you already checked and didn't find new deliveries created then most porbably there is a queue stuck in ERP.

You can check SMQ2 directly in ERP or from EWM via Warehouse Monitor -> Tools -> Message Queue -> LE Inbound Message Queue.

PPF action: /SCWM/MSG_PRD_SEND
Message: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content: Dequeue happens with Commit work when you use a scope 2 lock. This is an easy exercise with SAPGUI for windows and a nightmare with UI5.

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content: Why don't you use cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download?

entry.title: Re: Where Guided Sourcing meets SLP
entry.content: Excellent blog from a seasoned expert.   Process Framework especially allows customers to discern their own bespoke statuses for qualified and classifying suppliers.  Thanks Alia!

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Calculation view. Incorrect Count
entry.content:
HANA is simplifying/optimizing the SQL-statement at every node, to the requested fields only. 
Try to add more keep-flags to the other key-fields of your source
and try to set the keep-flag on others levels in your calculation view,
so that more details must be read.
Check your aggregated fields in your aggregation nodes and/or switch from aggregation to projection.

entry.title: Colombia Production Number Range Retrieval from DIAN
entry.content:
This guide provides clear steps for accessing Ranges from DIAN to Colombia in Production systems. Its primary focus is to assist customers going live with the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance-Colombia solution.

Prerequisites:

  1. Complete the Habilitation test process. The habilitation test process for the Colombia e-invoice ensures compliance with the e-invoicing requirements before a taxpayer is enabled as an authorized issuer of electronic invoices. The taxpayer must perform a series of tests to verify the software's correct functioning and compliance with the e-invoicing requirements. The tests include the generation, transmission, validation, and consultation of electronic invoices, credit notes, and debit notes.
  2. After the successful Habilitation tests, manually request the production number ranges for Invoices and Contingency Invoices in the DIAN portal.
  3. You have deployed the iflow for the Query Ranges in the production tenant.
  4. SOAMANGER configuration is completed.                     
  5. You must have the authorization to run the transaction ‘EDOC_CO_RANGES’ or report EDOC_CO21_QUERY_RANGES.
  6. You must know the Company Code and Software ID for running the transaction EDOC_CO_RANGES.

Note: You can get the Software ID from the DIAN portal.

7. The necessary configuration in EDOSOASERV is maintained and transported to the production system.

 

Important Notes:

  1. The logical port name in the SOAMANGER for the proxy object CO_EDO_CO21_QUERY_RANGES_V2_0 must match the logical port name maintained in the view EDOSOASERV for the SOA service name CO_GET_RANGES.
  2. The production ranges are only retrieved from DIAN for Invoices and Contingency invoices. In DIAN, only the ranges for invoices and contingency invoices are maintained.
  3. For all document types, such as Credit Notes and Debit Notes, you must choose the number ranges according to your business requirements and maintain them manually in SNRO.

Number Range Retrieval Steps:

  1. Execute transaction EDOC_CO_RANGES or follow the path in SPRO, Cross-Application Componentsà General Application Functionsà Document and Reporting Complianceà Country/Region-Specific SettingsàColombiaà Electronic Document Processingà Get Number Ranges for Invoices from Tax Authority
  2. Enter Company Code and Software ID

Example:

3. Press the Execute button.

4. A successful execution will create necessary configuration entries in SNRO and the view EDOCORANGESV. You can also view retrieved ranges in the report execution.

Example:

5. The retrieved ranges are stored in

  1. SNRO Against the object EDOC_CO and Company code used in the report execution.

The transaction EDOC_CO_RANGES will find the next available Number Range No. and adds it to the SNRO.

This means that screenshot 2 above shows that the range retrieved from DIAN is the number three position.

b. EDOCORANGESV - You use this Customizing view to enter the number ranges and their attributes to be used to create eDocuments. 

Example:

Next Steps After Range Retrieval from DIAN:

Maintain Ranges for Credit notes and Debit notes manually

  1. Go to SNRO and define number ranges for Credit and Debit Notes according to your business requirements.

2. Maintain Ranges for Credit and Debit Notes in EDOCORANGESV.

Example:

Assign Number Ranges to eDocument Types

In this Customizing activity, you assign number ranges to the eDocument types for Colombia.

The Variable Key field enables the use of different number ranges for the same eDocument types. A use case is, for example, if you want to use different number ranges for different organizational entities like branches, business places, or plants.

If the number range overlaps for Colombia eInvoice and Colombia eInvoice Contingency document types, you can define the range numbers used for the contingency process in the columns From Number – Contingency and To Number – Contingency.

For example, DIAN authorizes the number range from 100000 to 105000, but the numbers between 100000 and 100800 are to be used for contingency documents.

entry.title: Re: DI API add purchase invoice based on landed cost
entry.content:
Hi ricardo_renteria2,

This is a DI API limitation.

Kindly refer to SAP KBA 3374134 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Clock In/Out and Labor On/Off with SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @ManoelCosta. How could I add custom columns to the "Available Column List" in the List Column Editor? I specifically would like to add a custom column to Order Selection List through POD Editor.

 

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: Ensure that use executing the substitution has the necessary permission to access and execute the the exit routine.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Custom Code Analysis in SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Upgrades
entry.content:
Hi, is there available a ATC for upgrade form version 1610?

Thanks

entry.title: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
My report is grouped by status and sorted by the status column. Through the UI the grouping functionality accepts only one column as the criteria. How can I filter based on a combination of criteria?

Records to display in the first section (active or under renewal) if: Status is Active or (status is Renewal AND the expiration date is more recent than the last 12 months).

Records to display in the second section (Expired) if: Status is Expired or (status is Renewal AND the expiration date is older than 12 months ago from today).

entry.title: Re: Batch specific UOM master data
entry.content: Simply go in CL02, GO to Characteritics screen , go to extreme right and activate Proportion/Product Unit Relevant tick .

entry.title: Re: Cyrstal Reports Unable to open report in CR Enterprise
entry.content:
Hi Bill,

That's not possible unless the RPT file is either corrupted on the BOE server or you do not have writes to edit the report. As noted in the error message check with the BOE admin to verify you do have rights to edit it.

To clarify, you can open reports using CR Designer except if it's been saved as a CR for Ent. Report. Once saved as a CR for Ent it can then only be edited in CRfEnt.

CR for Ent. is ending life in a few years so I suggest not using that version any longer.

Search the home page for more info.

This link has it:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

Don

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Filtrar IncomingPayments por factura
entry.content:
POST https://yourserver:50000/b1s/v1/QueryService_PostQuery
{
    "QueryOption": "$expand=IncomingPayments($select=DocEntry, DocNum),IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices($select=DocEntry,DocNum)&$filter=IncomingPayments/DocEntry eq IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices/DocNum and IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices/DocEntry eq 2472",
    "QueryPath": "$crossjoin(IncomingPayments,IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices)"
}

entry.title: Re: Does crystal report 30 day trial doesn't provide 'Rep...
entry.content:
You can get CR for VS (.NET) from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

And CR for Eclipse (Java) here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088796.html

entry.title: Re: Debug Java Code in Agentry Cloud Edition (ACE)
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for the great article, very helpful!

I have followed all the steps but when I set the debug configuration and press 'Debug', I get the following error:

Server returned 401 (Unauthorized) for URL: https://debugging.hana.ondemand.com/start

On the BTP I have a admin and developer role (which has debug rights). Are there any other authorizations I need to enable to get this working?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content: Hello Edrilan Berisha,

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content: Hello Edrilan Berisha, Thanks for the response. I have passed both header and item as part of payload and the API has created both header and item sucessfully. I have verified the same in database tables, VBAK, VBAP. The problem that we are seeing is in the response Payload the items is blank. Our sender system is expecting the item data as well in the response payload. Please let me know if it is possible the get the same in the response payload. I have also reported this issue to SAP. Any insight would be very much help for us. We do not want to go in the direction of custom API for this requirement. Regards, Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for the response. Our sender system is expecting the item data as well as part of the response payload after successful POST operation and they do not want to perform another GET call. Please let me know if this is possible in this particular API.

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: Show Specific Groups Based on Record Criteria
entry.content: Yes please https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/filter-on-multiple-criteria/qaq-p/13662938

entry.title: Re: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from...
entry.content:
Hello,

First thing to note is SP 25 is very old, it's up to SP 35 now.

To take advantage of the current security updates and Clients etc. you should stay up dated, SP 25 will have a lot of security issues due to the age of it.

Also note the Platform info CR for VS no longer supports 2.0 framework and nor does Microsoft. SAP follows Microsoft End of Life for it's products due to CR is Windows Based. CR for VS currently only supports 4.7 and 4.8 framework, see this platform info for more info:

Supported Platforms

Also be aware Product teams are going to stop supporting 32 bit Operating OS's, there is no need to support them any more since all mother boards support 64 bit platform and there is no reason to run applications in 32 bit mode any more. Like in the late 1990's 16 bit OS's were on their way out, same is true for 32 bit software.

See this page for more info and latest download:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Also, for more CR for VS questions post here:

https://support.sap.com/en/product/support-by-product/01200615320800001270.html

entry.title: Re: Planning Professional vs Planning standard Capabilities
entry.content: @verdiam please stop tagging people directly on your questions. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content:
I'll get R&D to look into this but be aware SAP has it's own version of Java, not the one belonging to Oracle.

A quick search finds no KBA's on that CVE.

Crystal Reports itself uses Java Scripts and doesn't use the Java engine itself.

In CR Designer click on Help... About and the more info button. You will see if only uses 2 Java processes and not java.exe.

All I can suggest is to ignore that catch.

entry.title: Automatic assignment of serial number in outbound deliveries
entry.content:
In our logistics process we make purchases with items that handle series.

These products are sold and it is required that when executing the outbound delivery job the system generates the document with the series already entered from purchases

Any idea how to do this?

We have tried to put in the series profile that it is mandatory to mark it in the sales order, but the existing series in the system do not appear in the sales order, generating news that it does not exist, do you perhaps know why this happens?

entry.title: Can RSWUWFML2 Send an e-Mail Notification with the Link to the Work Item in My Fiori Inbox?
entry.content:
In ECC, we'd run RSWUWFML2 to send e-mail notifications for workflow tasks with an attachment that would take to the work item.

With S/4, we are pushing Fiori and would like to have something similar to that: a link that would lead to the work item in Fiori instead. Is that possible?

Example in ECC:

entry.title: Re: FF67 Manual reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you can use the SM37 transaction to check the jobs which have been finished. There you can filter for those jobs which are relevant for you.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: ODBC 18 Driver - Invalid Argument for Database
entry.content:
Got them, I sent the file to R&D last week, sorry I forgot to update you.

There was one fix they did and not ported into CR for VS.

He says it will be in SP 36, not sure when it'll be released, likely in June but may be sooner....

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content:
Currently MS SQL Server 2022 is not supported:

Supported Platforms

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order items during POST operation
entry.content: $batch can be used to initiate a GET request after the POST.

entry.title: build a link in C4C
entry.content:
I'm using this structure to build links and send it in mail for BYD system and it works

https://my******.sapbydesign.com/sap/public/ap/ui/runtime?bo_ns=http://sap.com/xi/AP/RFQProcessing/Global&bo=RequestForQuote&
node=Root&operation=SupplierQuoteComparison&object_key=57F9B95C97991EDEB9BF68B8A1C8E47C&key_type=APC_V_UUID

 

I'm trying to do the same in C4C system, it opens the required screen but empty with no data .. any help ?

entry.title: Allocation Using Advanced Formula with Parent Nodes as Driver
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We would like to create this outcome where driver and source value has different granularities and uses parent nodes as driver/source. Please refer to below figure. 

So far, we have been trying this code and it doesn't seem to work. Please advise for how we should debug this script further.

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "ZAMOUNT"
MEMBERSET [d/ZALLO_CYCLE] = "Cycle 3"
MEMBERSET [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = BASEMEMBER([d/ZACTY_TYPE], "MACH")
MEMBERSET [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/ZGL_ACCOUNT].[h/POH_Allocation], "ZAS-C2-005", "ZAS-C2-006", "ZAS-C2-007", "ZAS-C2-008", "ZAS-C2-009", "ZAS-C2-010", "ZAS-C2-011")

VARIABLEMEMBER #ACTY OF [d/ZACTY_TYPE]
VARIABLEMEMBER #CCTR OF [d/ZCCTR]

IF [d/ZCCTR] = %Driver% THEN
	DATA([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY", [d/ZALLO_CYCLE] = "Source", [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#")
	DATA([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/ZCCTR] = #CCTR, [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY")
	DATA.APPEND([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZAMOUNT") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZCCTR] = "131210", [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") / RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/ZCCTR] = #CCTR, [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY")
ENDIF

Thank you.

Bhumirapee A.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Hi Suzanne, thanks for sharing the change of certification. May I ask what would happen if failing to pass the stay certification assessment at first time. Will my certification be directly invalidated, or can I still keep taking the assessment until passing it, if so, is there a limit on number of attempts?

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas Scripting: Access CDS View on Pub...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

Since unfortunately, RFC is not available for Personas in a public cloud system, the only way to get other data that is not on the current screen is if you would navigate to some other screen where the information you are looking for is present, store those value(s) in variable(s), then return to the screen you are customizing, where you can use or display them. You can do this via scripting, but it is certainly slower and more complicated than performing an RFC.

entry.title: What happened to Currency property for Generic dimension, why did it disappear?
entry.content:
Last year, SAP offered an Open Course Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud.  I am trying to perform the guided exercise of Week 1.

Page 14 of these exercises instructs as follows: 
Create dimension SAP_CEP_SALESORG as a GENERIC dimension.  
Then click on properties for this dimension.
Under system properties, move the slider to the right to Enable currency.

When I create this dimension, there is no system property to set Enable currency.

On page 16, the exercise instructs to create another dimension SAP_CEP_ENTITY as a generic dimension.

When I click on its properties, you guessed it, there is no system property to enable currencies.

I realize that I could have created either one of these dimensions as type Organization, but only one dimension Organization is permitted.

So my question if how to define a currency property for both SAP_CEP_SALESORG and SAP_CEP_ENTITY because the data files that SAP provided include a column for currency in both of the Excel spreadsheets.

Bob

PS: I have previously activated the Currency conversion slider on Model preferences

entry.title: Re: Duplicidad en número de empleado
entry.content: Translated for anyone who will benefit... "Hello, if I have a collaborator in different company codes it is necessary that when returning to his or her source company code a new personnel number is assigned to him? If you have assigned a new personnel number, which would affect SAP ECP? Greetings from Mexico."

entry.title: Re: Manage Equipment connectivity
entry.content:
Hi Sayuj , 

Concept wise Equipment and Asset is Same or say Asset can represent machine, equipment or any shop floor smart devices.

Equipment connectivity is part of Asset Central and Usage of Asset Central framework in SAP Digital Manufacturing has been deprecated.

With 2311 release, customers can request to move SAP Digital Manufacturing tenant from Asset Central Model to Digital Manufacturing Asset Model (DMAM). 

SAP Note : https://me.sap.com/notes/3378368/E

Hope this helps.

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content:
Hello @aleksandra-0601,

sorry, my fault, the keys must be quoted.

SendKeys "%(b)"

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content: Did you try to use $top and $skip for paging? $count=true for checking how many records are you trying to download?

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content:
Hello @thomas_mller13,

as far as I understand it correctly, the requirement here is to automate SAP GUI for Windows via SAP GUI Scripting with VBA.

The calling convention you mention I know only from ABAP. Or is there another way? Let us know.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: View V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT Not Active in DDIC Error in Tran...
entry.content:
applied note 

3347817 - FI Line Item Browser: Incorrect references generated for views V_GLPOS_N_CT and V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT

https://me.sap.com/notes/3347817/E

entry.title: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hello.

After I execute Local Client Copy with SCCLN by Profile SAP_UCSV, can I delete the Source Client with SCC5N?

The Source Client is 100 and the Target Client is 200.

Because I only need 200 Client. (do not need the application data in 100)

Or is it better to simply lock 100 client (just in case)?

Thank you for all.

entry.title: Re: Common Errors in the Reports
entry.content: Great and clear.

entry.title: How can we export all entityTypes along with properties/ABAP Filed name
entry.content:
Hi Team

How can we export all entityTypes along with properties/ABAP Filed name related to corresponding standard ODATA Services which we activated under our landscape as per the business requirement

 

Best Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can we export all entityTypes along with properti...
entry.content:
T-code /n/iwfnd/maint_service can see all the online odata v2 service,
t-code  /iwfnd/v4_admin can see all the online odata v4 service.

Then for each odata service $metadata call, will list all the entitytype, entityset, properties, etc.

entry.title: Is there a way to get my PM orders with a basic start & finish dates 1 month apart?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Is there a way to get my scheduled preventive maintenance orders having basic start date at the beginning of the month and the basic finish at the end of the month? I plan to have this automated for all work orders.

entry.title: Localization (i18n) on Rap application not working
entry.content: I am trying to localize the application in VS code but it not affect on the ui text .

entry.title: Re: Archive Project definition and WBS Element deletion
entry.content:
Firstable, update the file size. In run again the programm.

If error continues, check that the variants exist, clicking on the match code. If variants doesn´t exist create them, save the changes and run again the programm.

entry.title: Re: Introducing: SAP Web Components
entry.content:
Hi Oliver,

We are SAP partner and we want to test UI5 Web Components. As its github (ui5-webcomponents) is updated monthly, it's unstable for us to test. Is there any way to get the the designed version ? or Is there any way to switch to other versions ? For example, the current UI5 Web Component version is 1.24, how can I change it to version 1.22 ?

Many thanks.

 

BRs,

Lisa Shang

entry.title: Re: External view V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT active fail
entry.content: Please try to refresh first and regenerate. Hope it work.
